bio: design engineer with 20+ years building digital products — interfaces, platforms, and the systems behind them. currently principal at [third index](https://thirdindex.co), a small design and engineering studio. available for fractional and contract work.

timeline.title: modern treasury
timeline.description: built interfaces for an enterprise fintech platform processing billions in payments annually. contributed to motion patterns, component systems, and headless cms infrastructure.

timeline.title: metropolis
timeline.description: built smart contract deployment tooling (metal.build) and dao governance products (pod.xyz). worked across evm-compatible dapps, farcaster integrations, and web3 frontends.

timeline.title: freelance
timeline.description: contract work across agencies, publishers, consumer brands, and fintech. clients include elara pictures, amazon, pentagram, and axoni. built marketplaces, editorial systems, and product interfaces.

timeline.title: vice media
timeline.description: led a team of 10 building the publishing platform for vice, noisey, motherboard, and munchies. migrated from legacy lamp stack to microservices and react. established component systems and frontend standards.

timeline.title: condé nast
timeline.description: built responsive sites for gq, wired, and architectural digest. collaborated with internal teams, global brands, and agencies on editorial features and campaigns.
